title: WAF XML External Entity Attack Blocked
description: Detects XXE (XML External Entity) injection attempts blocked by WAF. Attackers exploit XML parsers to read files, perform SSRF, or execute denial of service.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and ( (('Request URL' like '*<!DOCTYPE*' or 'Request URL' like '*<!ENTITY*' or 'Request URL' like '*SYSTEM *' or 'Request URL' like '*file:///*' or 'Request URL' like '*expect://*' or 'Request URL' like '*php://filter*' or 'Request URL' like '*data://text*')) or ( (('Request Body' like '*<!DOCTYPE*' or 'Request Body' like '*<!ENTITY*' or 'Request Body' like '*SYSTEM *' or 'Request Body' like '*file:///*' or 'Request Body' like '*php://filter*')) and (('Content Type' like '*text/xml*' or 'Content Type' like '*application/xml*')) ) ))
